texto: I like my whiskey neat and strong just as I like my women. Women who have matured in their minds and bodies
autor: women who have faced the storms of life! Because my life has always been about the thrill with the raging storms!
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a women who have faced the storms of life! Because my life has always been about the thrill with the raging storms!: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de temas ligados a reflexao. O trecho “I like my whiskey neat and strong just as I like my women. Women who have matured in their minds …” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que reflexao, avijeet-das, women pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de reflexao.
